content.json:
## AVD Rebuild Tracker
Live pipeline state for `Recreate-AVDSessionHosts`. Each session host moves through a sequence of phases; this workbook shows where every VM is right now, how long each phase took, and what (if anything) failed.

_Source: `AzureDiagnostics` (Automation `JobStreams` / `JobLogs`) in this Log Analytics workspace._

parameters.name: Hostpool
parameters.label: Hostpool
parameters.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION"
| where Category in ("JobStreams", "JobLogs")
| where RunbookName_s == "Recreate-AVDSessionHosts"
| where ResultDescription contains "] status="
| extend VmName = extract(@"\] \[([^\]]+)\] status=", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Hostpool = extract(@"^([A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9]*?)-\d+$", 1, VmName)
| where isnotempty(Hostpool)
| summarize by Hostpool
| order by Hostpool asc

content.json:
### Live per-VM state
Latest status for every session host the runbook has touched in the selected window.

content.query:
let base = AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION"
| where Category in ("JobStreams", "JobLogs")
| where RunbookName_s == "Recreate-AVDSessionHosts";
let phaseRows = base
| where ResultDescription contains "] status="
| extend VmName = extract(@"\] \[([^\]]+)\] status=", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Phase  = extract(@"status=(\w+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Detail = trim(@"\s+", extract(@"status=\w+\s*(.*)$", 1, ResultDescription))
| where isnotempty(VmName) and isnotempty(Phase)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase, Detail;
let successRows = base
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDCOMPLETED]"
| extend VmName = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| where isnotempty(VmName)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase = "Completed", Detail = "Rebuild completed (terminal marker)";
let failureRows = base
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDFAILED]"
| extend VmName = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Detail = trim(@"\s+", extract(@"Reason=(.*)$", 1, ResultDescription))
| where isnotempty(VmName)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase = "Failed", Detail;
union phaseRows, successRows, failureRows
| where VmName matches regex strcat(@"^", "{Hostpool}", @"-\d")
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, Phase, Detail) by VmName
| extend ['Time in phase'] = now() - TimeGenerated
| project VmName, Phase, ['Last update']=TimeGenerated, ['Time in phase'], Detail
| order by VmName asc
content.noDataMessage: No runbook activity in this time range.

content.json:
### Phase timeline
Horizontal bars show how long each VM spent in each phase. Color = phase.

content.query:
let base = AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION"
| where Category in ("JobStreams", "JobLogs")
| where RunbookName_s == "Recreate-AVDSessionHosts";
let phaseRows = base
| where ResultDescription contains "] status="
| extend VmName = extract(@"\] \[([^\]]+)\] status=", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Phase = extract(@"status=(\w+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| where isnotempty(VmName) and isnotempty(Phase)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase;
let successRows = base
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDCOMPLETED]"
| extend VmName = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| where isnotempty(VmName)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase = "Completed";
let failureRows = base
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDFAILED]"
| extend VmName = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| where isnotempty(VmName)
| project TimeGenerated, VmName, Phase = "Failed";
let events = union phaseRows, successRows, failureRows
| where VmName matches regex strcat(@"^", "{Hostpool}", @"-\d")
| order by VmName asc, TimeGenerated asc;
events
| serialize
| extend NextTime = next(TimeGenerated), NextVm = next(VmName)
| extend EndTime = iff(NextVm == VmName and isnotnull(NextTime), NextTime, now())
| extend DurationSec = todouble(datetime_diff('second', EndTime, TimeGenerated))
| where DurationSec > 0
| project VmName, Phase, DurationSec
| summarize Seconds = sum(DurationSec) by VmName, Phase
| evaluate pivot(Phase, sum(Seconds), VmName)
| order by VmName asc
content.noDataMessage: No phase transitions in this time range.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION"
| where Category in ("JobStreams", "JobLogs")
| where RunbookName_s == "Recreate-AVDSessionHosts"
| where ResultDescription has "[ALERT-VMREBUILDCOMPLETED]"
| extend Hostpool = extract(@"Hostpool=(\S+)", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend VmName   = extract(@"VmName=(\S+)",   1, ResultDescription)
| where Hostpool == "{Hostpool}"
| summarize Rebuilds = dcount(strcat(VmName, format_datetime(TimeGenerated,'yyyyMMddHH'))) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: VMs rebuilt (hourly)
content.noDataMessage: No completed rebuilds in this time range.

content.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceProvider == "MICROSOFT.AUTOMATION"
| where Category in ("JobStreams", "JobLogs")
| where RunbookName_s == "Recreate-AVDSessionHosts"
| where ResultDescription contains "status=Failed"
| extend VmName = extract(@"\] \[([^\]]+)\] status=", 1, ResultDescription)
| extend Reason = trim(@"\s+", extract(@"status=Failed\s*(.*)$", 1, ResultDescription))
| where VmName matches regex strcat(@"^", "{Hostpool}", @"-\d")
| project ['When']=TimeGenerated, VmName, Reason
| order by ['When'] desc
content.title: Recent failures
content.noDataMessage: No failures in this time range.

content.json:
### Legend

| Phase | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| **Pending** | Queued; no worker has picked it up yet. |
| **Claimed** | A Process job has the lock and will rebuild this VM. |
| **AwaitingUsers** | Skipped this cycle: live user sessions are still on the host. |
| **Capturing** | Snapshotting NIC, extensions, DCR association into the snapshot variable. |
| **Deleting** | Old VM (and OS disk) being removed. |
| **Creating** | New VM being deployed from the gallery image. |
| **DomainJoining** | Running the AD domain-join extension. |
| **RegisteringAvd** | Installing the AVD agent and registering with the host pool. |
| **RestoringExtensions** | Reapplying captured extensions (AMA, etc.). |
| **RestoringDcr** | Re-associating Data Collection Rules. |
| **WaitingForRegistration** | DSC done; polling the host pool for the AVD agent to self-register. |
| **Completed** | Rebuild finished. Drain mode is ON until Runbook 2 verifies Entra/hybrid join. |
| **Failed** | Hard error. Will retry automatically after `FailureRetryMinutes`. |

_The expected happy path is roughly: **Pending -> Claimed -> Capturing -> Deleting -> Creating -> DomainJoining -> RegisteringAvd -> RestoringExtensions -> RestoringDcr -> WaitingForRegistration -> Completed**._
